detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ActiasArtemis.openTrading() (ActiasArtemis.sol#613-639):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (ActiasArtemis.sol#623)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ActiasArtemis.sol#625)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ActiasArtemis.sol#625)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (ActiasArtemis.sol#635)
	ActiasArtemis.tradingOpen (ActiasArtemis.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ActiasArtemis.openTrading() (ActiasArtemis.sol#613-639)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ActiasArtemis._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ActiasArtemis.sol#479-543):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ActiasArtemis.sol#525)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ActiasArtemis.sol#557-569)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ActiasArtemis.sol#531)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (ActiasArtemis.sol#607)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (ActiasArtemis.sol#541)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ActiasArtemis.sol#695)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ActiasArtemis.sol#675)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ActiasArtemis.sol#677)
	ActiasArtemis._rOwned (ActiasArtemis.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ActiasArtemis._takeTeam(uint256) (ActiasArtemis.sol#689-697)
	- ActiasArtemis._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ActiasArtemis.sol#671-685)
	- ActiasArtemis.balanceOf(address) (ActiasArtemis.sol#397-401)
	- ActiasArtemis.constructor() (ActiasArtemis.sol#347-361)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (ActiasArtemis.sol#541)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ActiasArtemis.sol#703)
	ActiasArtemis._rTotal (ActiasArtemis.sol#297) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ActiasArtemis._getCurrentSupply() (ActiasArtemis.sol#795-805)
	- ActiasArtemis._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ActiasArtemis.sol#701-707)
	- ActiasArtemis.constructor() (ActiasArtemis.sol#347-361)
	- ActiasArtemis.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ActiasArtemis.sol#453-461)
